name: home-care-pwa
description: PWA gestionale Home Care per clienti, immobili, GPS, controlli, report, dashboard e pagamenti Stripe.

scripts.start: node scripts/generate-pwa-png-icons.js && node scripts/patch-pwa-ui-safe.js && node scripts/start-stable.js
scripts.predeploy: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.check: node --check server3.js && node --check scripts/migrate.js && node --check scripts/seed.js && node --check scripts/start-stable.js && node --check scripts/patch-pwa-ui-safe.js && node --check scripts/generate-pwa-png-icons.js
